texto_en: And for all I know they may be dancing in the palace still.
texto_pt: E pelo que eu sei, eles ainda podem estar dançando no palácio.
prompt_en: elegantly dressed medieval couples twirling joyfully across a magnificent golden palace ballroom lit by a thousand candles, the music seemingly endless, laughter filling the vaulted halls, flowers cascading from the balconies above

texto_en: And the kingdom rejoiced at the end of the tyrant's reign.
texto_pt: E o reino se alegrou com o fim do reinado do tirano.
prompt_en: jubilant crowds flooding a medieval city square in celebration, colorful banners unfurling from castle walls, flower petals raining down from every window, church bells ringing across rooftops, the broken crown of the tyrant lying discarded in the street

texto_en: Despite his terrible crime, the king agreed to spare his life.
texto_pt: Apesar de seu terrível crime, o rei concordou em poupar sua vida.
prompt_en: a powerful king descending from his golden throne to place a hand on the shoulder of a kneeling chained prisoner, lifting them to their feet with merciful eyes, guards and court watching in stunned silence in the torch-lit hall

texto_en: Her courage had made her rich.
prompt_en: a determined young woman in travel-worn clothes standing triumphantly at the center of an overflowing treasure vault, sword raised, golden light bathing her face, the rewards of her dangerous quest spread around her feet

texto_en: But no matter how hard they searched they were never able to find it again.
texto_pt: Mas por mais que procurassem, nunca mais conseguiram encontrá-lo.
prompt_en: a group of weary medieval travelers searching through a vast featureless misty moorland, looking desperately in all directions with lanterns raised, the object of their quest nowhere to be found, the land offering no answers

texto_en: And they remained blind for the rest of their days for their wickedness and falsehood.
texto_pt: E permaneceram cegos pelo resto de seus dias por sua maldade e falsidade.
prompt_en: two once-wealthy figures in tattered rich robes stumbling blindly through a dark corridor, hands outstretched and groping, unable to see the light at the end of the hall, their deception written in the darkness surrounding them

texto_en: And when they died they passed it on to their children.
texto_pt: E quando morreram, passaram-no para seus filhos.
prompt_en: elderly parents in a warmly lit cottage solemnly placing a glowing golden heirloom into the hands of their grown children, a moment of tender ceremony, the legacy of generations passing from one set of hands to another

texto_en: So he told her he was the prince and they lived happily ever after.
texto_pt: Então ele lhe disse que era o príncipe e viveram felizes para sempre.
prompt_en: a young man removing a traveling cloak to reveal gleaming royal armor beneath, kneeling before a surprised and delighted young woman in a moonlit garden, a golden crown extended toward her in both hands

texto_en: So the cook prepared it for the feast and it was delicious.
texto_pt: Então o cozinheiro o preparou para o banquete e ficou delicioso.
prompt_en: a proud rotund cook presenting a magnificent steaming golden roasted dish at the head of a long feast table crowded with hungry nobles, the cook beaming with pride, candlelight reflecting off platters heaped with medieval fare

texto_en: So the king relented and the two were married.
texto_pt: Então o rei cedeu e os dois se casaram.
prompt_en: a radiant couple joining hands before a flower-draped altar in a soaring gothic cathedral, rose petals falling from the vaulted ceiling, the congregation rising to its feet to applaud, stained glass light streaming down in every color

texto_en: So the queen gave them the prize as she had promised.
texto_pt: Então a rainha lhes deu o prêmio como havia prometido.
prompt_en: a stately queen descending from her dais with an ornate golden trophy, presenting it graciously to two kneeling heroes as the assembled court watches with admiration and applause, the queen's expression one of regal satisfaction at her kept promise

texto_en: So the rightful ruler was placed on the throne once more.
texto_pt: Então o governante legítimo foi colocado no trono mais uma vez.
prompt_en: a solemn archbishop lowering a heavy jeweled crown onto the bowed head of a young ruler seated on a grand marble throne, the entire court kneeling in acknowledgment, sunlight from tall windows illuminating the moment

texto_en: So they escaped their captors and fled home.
texto_pt: Então escaparam de seus captores e fugiram para casa.
prompt_en: two ragged but overjoyed prisoners bursting through a fortress gate into blinding sunlight, broken chains dangling from their wrists, the dark castle looming behind them as they sprint toward a green valley and a distant cottage

texto_en: So they returned what was stolen to its original owner.
texto_pt: Então devolveram o que foi roubado ao seu dono original.
prompt_en: a reformed figure kneeling in a sunlit courtyard, presenting a golden crown on outstretched hands to its tearful rightful owner, a crowd of onlookers cheering, justice and redemption palpable in the scene

texto_en: The king fulfilled his side of the bargain and everyone was happy.
texto_pt: O rei cumpriu sua parte no acordo e todos ficaram felizes.
prompt_en: a beaming king clasping the hand of a humble villager before his full court, servants carrying a chest of gold behind them, smiles on every face in the throne room as the promise made long ago is finally kept

texto_pt: A loucura do príncipe foi curada.
prompt_en: a disheveled prince kneeling with eyes closed in a palace courtyard as soft golden healing light descends on him, his wild tormented expression melting into calm peace, dark wisps of madness dissolving into the clear air, his court watching in tearful relief

texto_en: Which meant they would become king and queen in the course of time.
texto_pt: O que significava que se tornariam rei e rainha com o passar do tempo.
prompt_en: a young couple in simple but noble clothes standing hand in hand on a hillside at golden sunset, gazing toward a magnificent castle on the horizon knowing it will one day be theirs, hope and destiny shining in their faces

texto_en: And his mother was delighted with such an unusual gift.
texto_pt: E sua mãe ficou encantada com um presente tão incomum.
prompt_en: a mother's face lighting up in astonished delight as her young child presents an impossibly extraordinary magical creature or glowing object in a humble medieval cottage, the child grinning proudly

texto_en: And she kept her father's advice in mind from that day onwards.
texto_pt: E ela manteve o conselho de seu pai em mente daquele dia em diante.
prompt_en: a young woman pausing thoughtfully at a forest crossroads, closing her eyes as a gentle translucent vision of her wise elderly father's face appears beside her in warm golden light, his counsel guiding her choice

texto_en: And so the old woman's prophecy had been fulfilled.
texto_pt: E assim a profecia da velha senhora se cumpriu.
prompt_en: an ancient crone seated by a crackling fireplace smiling with deep satisfaction, while through the window behind her the exact scene she once foretold plays out in glowing magical light, her prophecy realized to the letter

texto_en: And the parents were reunited with their long-lost child.
texto_pt: E os pais foram reunidos com seu filho há muito perdido.
prompt_en: parents falling to their knees in a sunlit meadow to embrace a weeping child who has returned after years apart, arms wrapped tightly around each other, wildflowers scattering around them, the ache of long separation dissolving into pure joy

texto_en: She escaped that awful place and fled home.
texto_pt: Ela escapou daquele lugar terrível e fugiu para casa.
prompt_en: a barefoot girl in torn clothes sprinting down a moonlit forest path, hair streaming behind her, the dark silhouette of a forbidding fortress receding behind her, a warm candlelit cottage glowing at the edge of the trees ahead

texto_en: Every day he saw the result of his disobedience, and wept.
texto_pt: Todos os dias ele via o resultado de sua desobediência e chorava.
prompt_en: a man on his knees pressing his hands to his face in grief, before a withered cursed landscape of dead trees and cracked earth stretching to the horizon — a ruin entirely of his own making, tears falling onto the barren ground

texto_en: He was freed from his enchantment and the next day they were married.
texto_pt: Ele foi libertado de seu encantamento e no dia seguinte se casaram.
prompt_en: a man throwing his arms wide as dark magical vines and chains explode off his body in a burst of golden light, his tormented expression transforming into pure joy, the woman who freed him reaching toward him as the enchantment dissolves

texto_en: He lived the rest of his life as a beggar — which was perfectly just.
texto_pt: Ele viveu o resto de sua vida como mendigo — o que era perfeitamente justo.
prompt_en: a haggard old man in tattered robes slumped in a cold village alley, a faded crown emblem still barely visible on his ragged sleeve hinting at his former power, passersby ignoring him entirely — justice quietly, completely served

texto_en: His wound was healed but his heart remained broken forever.
texto_pt: Sua ferida foi curada, mas seu coração permaneceu partido para sempre.
prompt_en: a warrior standing in golden sunlight with perfectly restored armor and no trace of injury, yet his eyes fixed on a small open locket in his palm with an expression of unbearable quiet sadness, the physical wound gone but the deeper one unchanged

texto_en: It just shows that stepmothers aren't always what they seem.
texto_pt: Isso só mostra que madrastas nem sempre são o que parecem.
prompt_en: a woman who appeared stern and cold in a dark dress gently opening a door to let warm light spill across two wary children, her hard expression dissolving unexpectedly into a soft genuine smile, the children's fear turning to surprised wonder

texto_en: So he forgave her and they were married.
texto_pt: Então ele a perdoou e se casaram.
prompt_en: a young man gently cupping a tearful young woman's face in his hands outside a flower-adorned village chapel, his expression full of forgiveness and love overcoming hurt, their friends crowned with flowers celebrating around them in the warm sun

texto_en: So he realized how loyal his sister had been.
texto_pt: Então ele percebeu o quão leal sua irmã havia sido.
prompt_en: a young man dropping his sword in astonishment as the full truth of his sister's years of quiet sacrifice becomes clear to him, reaching toward her with trembling arms and tears streaming down his face, her own expression one of patient love finally recognized

texto_en: So the village was restored to prosperity.
texto_pt: Então a vila foi restaurada à prosperidade.
prompt_en: a vibrant medieval village glowing with renewed life — freshly thatched rooftops, overflowing market stalls, children playing in clean streets, flowers in every window box, neighbors laughing, sunlight breaking through after a long period of darkness

texto_en: So they changed places and everything was back to normal.
texto_pt: Então trocaram de lugar e tudo voltou ao normal.
prompt_en: two people stepping simultaneously through twin shimmering magical doorways that exchange them — one from a palace into a cottage, one from a cottage into a palace — swirling golden energy fading as each lands exactly where they belong

texto_en: So they promised never to fight again.
prompt_en: two former rivals slowly lowering their weapons and clasping each other's forearms in a solemn oath of peace beneath a brilliant rainbow arching over a freshly silent battlefield, the last echoes of conflict fading

texto_en: Which proves that a heart that is brave and true will always triumph in the end.
texto_pt: O que prova que um coração corajoso e verdadeiro sempre triunfará no final.
prompt_en: a radiant golden heart suspended like a beacon in the sky above a darkened kingdom, its warm light driving back every shadow from every corner, roads and rivers below illuminated, hope restored to all who look upon it

texto_en: Which proves you should always be careful when choosing your companions.
texto_pt: O que prova que você deve sempre ter cuidado ao escolher seus companheiros.
prompt_en: a lone traveler at a foggy crossroads studying three very different figures who each offer to accompany them — one glowing with quiet honesty, one half-shadowed and shifty, one cloaked and unreadable — the choice between them everything

texto_en: And as long as she lived it could never be removed.
texto_pt: E enquanto ela vivesse, nunca poderia ser removido.
prompt_en: a woman in a medieval gown pulling desperately at an ornate glowing necklace fused permanently to her throat, her expression shifting between wonder and dismay, the magical clasp pulsing warmly against her skin, refusing every attempt to undo it

texto_en: And so the witch perished in her own cauldron.
texto_pt: E assim a bruxa pereceu em seu próprio caldeirão.
prompt_en: a smoking iron cauldron in a shattered stone cottage, the witch's pointed hat and tattered robes floating in the still-bubbling liquid, candles snuffed out, shelves of potions toppled, an uncanny silence where evil once filled the room

texto_en: Beaten, the foul creature was driven out of the kingdom.
texto_pt: Derrotada, a criatura vil foi expulsa do reino.
prompt_en: an ugly defeated creature fleeing at full speed down a dusty road lined with torch-bearing villagers shouting it away, the castle gates closing firmly behind it, the kingdom's banners flying triumphantly above

texto_en: She never let her treasure out of her sight again.
texto_pt: Ela nunca mais perdeu seu tesouro de vista.
prompt_en: a determined woman sleeping upright in a wooden chair with both arms wrapped tightly around a small iron-banded treasure chest, one eye half-open in vigilance even in slumber, never trusting the world enough to let it go again

texto_en: He saw the error of his ways and lived a good life from that day forward.
texto_pt: Ele viu o erro de seus caminhos e viveu uma boa vida daquele dia em diante.
prompt_en: a once-selfish nobleman rolling up his sleeves to help village peasants lay bricks on a new cottage wall in warm afternoon light, laughing freely alongside them, the complete transformation of his character visible in every gesture

texto_en: So it was transformed back into human form.
texto_pt: Então foi transformado de volta à forma humana.
prompt_en: a beast mid-transformation, dark fur dissolving into human skin as a cascade of golden sparks swirls upward, claws becoming hands, the creature's anguished features reshaping into a handsome human face filled with overwhelming relief

texto_en: So she revealed her true identity and they were married.
texto_pt: Então ela revelou sua verdadeira identidade e se casaram.
prompt_en: a woman in a simple peasant dress pulling back her hood to reveal a gleaming tiara and the radiant face of a princess, a stunned groom reaching toward her with trembling hands in a flower-strewn chapel, the assembled guests erupting in joy

texto_en: So she knew that her visitor had been a monster all along.
texto_pt: Então ela soube que seu visitante havia sido um monstro o tempo todo.
prompt_en: a woman holding a candle up to a cracked door, its shadow on the wall revealing the unmistakable silhouette of a horned monster where a friendly visitor had stood just moments before, her face frozen in a moment of terrible realization

texto_en: So the evil-doers were thrown down a well.
texto_pt: Então os malfeitores foram jogados em um poço.
prompt_en: two sneering villains in fine but torn robes tumbling backward over the rim of a deep stone well into darkness below, a circle of satisfied villagers watching their just punishment with solemn grim faces

texto_en: So the spell was broken and they were free.
texto_pt: Então o feitiço foi quebrado e eles ficaram livres.
prompt_en: dark binding chains and magical tendrils exploding into shards of light simultaneously around a group of enchanted people who gasp and look at each other in recognition for the first time in years, the oppressive magical darkness lifting from the room like a lifted veil

texto_en: The curse was lifted as had been foretold.
texto_pt: A maldição foi levantada como havia sido profetizado.
prompt_en: a black magical storm that has blanketed a castle and its lands for years suddenly parting as a column of brilliant golden light descends, dead vegetation greening instantaneously, villagers stepping into sunlight for the first time in memory, the prophecy fulfilled

texto_en: The flames rose higher and the wicked place was destroyed.
texto_pt: As chamas subiram mais alto e o lugar perverso foi destruído.
prompt_en: a forbidding black-stone fortress consumed by roaring supernatural flames of orange and crimson, its towers crumbling one by one as sparks shower into the night sky, the surrounding land already beginning to green and heal at the edges of the firelight

texto_en: The monster was destroyed and the city was safe once more.
texto_pt: O monstro foi destruído e a cidade ficou segura mais uma vez.
prompt_en: a colossal monster crashing to the cobblestones between stone buildings, cracking the street, as the hero stands over it sword raised in victory and citizens begin to peer cautiously and then joyfully from doorways and windows, relief flooding the city

texto_en: They were buried in the same grave, and the kingdom mourned them.
texto_pt: Foram enterrados na mesma sepultura, e o reino os pranteou.
prompt_en: a long procession of black-clad mourners winding through the streets of a medieval city, a flower-strewn bier at its heart, every window above lined with bowed heads, the entire kingdom united in grief for those it has lost

texto_en: True love had broken the enchantment.
texto_pt: O amor verdadeiro havia quebrado o encantamento.
prompt_en: a tender kiss between two figures dissolving a swirling dark enchantment into an eruption of cascading flowers and warm golden light, the world transforming around them from grey and cold to vivid and alive, the power of the spell shattered by something stronger

texto_en: Which is how the kingdom got such an unusual name.
texto_pt: E foi assim que o reino ganhou um nome tão incomum.
prompt_en: a weathered stone herald's plinth at a crossroads bearing a strangely carved coat of arms and an outlandish kingdom name, puzzled travelers examining it while a knowing local elder smiles and begins to tell the tale of how it came to be

texto_en: With the enemy dead they could get married at last.
texto_pt: Com o inimigo morto, puderam finalmente se casar.
prompt_en: a battle-worn couple exchanging vows on a sunlit hilltop, armor still dusty from recent hard-won combat, swords and shields set aside in the wildflowers at their feet, friends and allies cheering around them, finally free to love without fear
